name: Paper Pals

worldAttacks.name: Prize Ball 2
worldAttacks.description: A random high-tier attack or effect.

worldAttacks.name: Mystery Box 2
worldAttacks.description: Randomly swaps in a different party for one battle.

worldAttacks.name: Mimic Ball
worldAttacks.description: Mimics whatever attack the party just used.

notes: A cluster of paper cutout versions of the cast, exclusive to FNaF World; not a single character in other continuities.

Attacks per the original 2016 (Update 1) FNaF World roster, cross-referenced from a Steam community moveset guide; Update 2 rebalanced some characters' movesets and this has not been reconciled move-by-move.

name: Endoplush

worldAttacks.description: A force field that blocks half of incoming damage.

notes: A plush-and-endoskeleton hybrid, the only FNaF World playable character with no design basis in any other FNAF game.
